summary: Early-stage Go CLI rewrite of a project called supermac, scaffolded with Cobra and following standard Go layout conventions.
patterns: Separation of concerns via internal packages
concerns: Project appears to be in early scaffolding phase with minimal implementation
Empty top-level directories (bin/, lib/, config/, plugins/, tests/) suggest incomplete migration or planning
Duplicate config directories (config/ and supermac-go/internal/config/) may cause confusion
No domain logic evident yet beyond CLI structure
suggestions: Implement core domain logic in the module package
Consolidate configuration handling to avoid duplicate config paths
Remove or populate empty top-level directories to clarify project structure
Add integration tests as the feature set grows
Establish CI/CD pipeline for the Go rewrite
